title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.500 - Duty of public administrator on receipt of money or property
text:
58.500.  Duty of public administrator on receipt of money or property. — Upon delivery of any money to the public administrator, he or she shall follow the procedures as set out in section 473.743.
(RSMo 1939 § 13267, A.L. 2007 S.B. 22 merged with S.B. 497) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11648; 1919 § 5956; 1909 § 2961
